2204770.name: Language Adventure
2204770.description:
Learn a new language in a handmade town and interact with objects and characters in stop motion animated scenes!

Story:
• When an alien spaceship crash-lands in your garden you must learn to communicate with them and help them return home!

Gameplay:
• A point and click adventure game!
• Interact with a variety of objects and characters in stop motion animated scenes
• Solve logical puzzles and explore a (very) small town!

Audience:
• Language adventure is a game for all ages.
• The game is suitable for beginners and intermediate learners.

System Requirements:
• Language Adventure is a PC game that requires a Windows, Mac, or Linux operating system.
2204770.supported_languages:
英语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 法语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
